subject: WM-0169 ready for review
body: Commit 3216cda rebaselines completed PR-1 truth, accepts ADR-0017, proposes ADR-0018 schema4/projection-v2 plus explicit pause/1x/2x/4x, defines the eight-resident full-day architecture, creates strict serial proposed/unclaimed WM-0170..WM-0175, and reconciles WM-0154; handoff/task/DAG/scope/quality gates pass (78 files/462 tests), with no product/protocol/save/release implementation.
